overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a heavy rainstorm in an urban Los Santos neighborhood. The camera moves along wet sidewalks, crosses a street intersection with passing traffic, and passes a pedestrian standing in the downpour. The atmosphere is gloomy with reduced visibility from the rain, featuring palm trees, apartment buildings, and reflective wet pavement throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk next to blue construction wall during heavy downpour

entered.detail: tall blue painted wall with wooden fence sections and warning signs
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
tall street lamp along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a blue construction wall on the left. Palm trees and apartment buildings are visible through the heavy rain in the distance. The street is quiet with only sparse vehicle traffic visible on the wet road.

events.description: blue construction wall ends and is replaced by green hedge, opening up to intersection view

agents.ego_description: continuing walk as the enclosed sidewalk opens up to a street intersection with traffic lights

entered.detail: red and white triangular yield sign at intersection corner
green manicured hedge replacing the construction wall
overhead traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The blue construction wall ends and is replaced by a green hedge as the camera approaches a street intersection. A yield sign and traffic lights become visible. The sidewalk continues toward the crosswalk with apartment buildings now closer on the right.

events.description: stepping off curb and beginning to cross the multi-lane street
black muscle car and large truck pass by on the wet road while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street through moderate traffic while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: large dark truck waiting at the red traffic light
man standing on opposite sidewalk in the heavy rain

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with power lines crossing the street
classic black muscle car with blue stripes driving past
blue USPS-style mailbox on the far corner

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide street intersection through moderate traffic. A black muscle car and large truck pass by on the rain-slicked road. On the opposite sidewalk, a pedestrian stands in the downpour. Utility poles and traffic lights frame the crossing as the camera moves toward the other side.

events.description: approaching and passing pedestrian standing in rain next to stopped car

agents.ego_description: walking past a pedestrian huddled in the rain and continuing down the residential sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in t-shirt and jeans standing in heavy rain, appearing cold or distressed near a stopped car

entered.detail: blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk
gas station canopy and pumps becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera walks along the opposite sidewalk past a pedestrian standing in the heavy rain. A blue mailbox appears on the left, and a gas station becomes visible in the distance ahead. The walk continues through the rain-soaked residential area with apartment buildings lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rain-drenched urban neighborhood that transitions from a secluded construction zone to a busy street intersection and into a residential area. It begins along a rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a blue construction wall, with palm trees and apartment buildings blurred by the heavy downpour. As the wall ends, the path shifts toward a green hedge and a street intersection where yield signs and traffic lights emerge from the gloom. The camera then crosses the wide, slick road through moderate traffic, passing a black muscle car and a large truck before reaching the opposite sidewalk. Finally, the movement continues past a pedestrian standing in the rain and a blue mailbox, heading toward a distant gas station as apartment buildings line the right side of the residential street.
